arts.ttl: Barcelona transfer news and rumours: Deco addresses future of veteran player as questions about "next season" arise
arts.sum: Barcelona sporting director Deco addresses the future of one of the club's veteran players amidst speculation that he could leave before the start of next season.

arts.ttl: La Liga to reject Barcelona fixture change request after letter
arts.sum: Barcelona have requested that their clash with Real Valladolid be brought forward in order to help with their Champions League semi-final preparations. Despite the Blaugrana sending a formal request to La Liga, the league are set to reject their petition. On Friday, Barcelona manager Hansi Flick expunged a furious rant about the scheduling in Spain, […] The post La Liga to reject Barcelona fixture change request after letter appeared first on Football España.

arts.ttl: Soto Grado overlooked as Barcelona & Real Madrid discover referee for Copa final
arts.sum: The identity of the referee for the upcoming Copa del Rey final has on Monday been revealed. The official set to take charge of the fixture? Ricardo de Burgos Bengoetxea.…

arts.ttl: Which Barcelona stars have played the fewest minutes this season?

arts.ttl: Thiago Alcantara explains changes to Barcelona style under Hansi Flick
arts.sum: Barcelona may not have been at their best in recent games, but ultimately are still well in the hunt for the three major trophies this season. Hansi Flick has delivered performance from the Blaugrana well beyond any expectations this season already. arts.ttl: Flick has words of warning for De Jong ahead of Mallorca clash
arts.sum: Flick was asked about De Jong ahead of Barcelona’s next game against Mallorca and admitted he wasn’t too impressed with some of his play at the weekend. Barcelona manager Hansi Flick had a few words of warning for Frenkie de Jong ahead of Tuesday’s clash with Real Mallorca in La Liga .

arts.ttl: Barcelona & Real Madrid in small group of clubs who can activate Dortmund star’s release clause this summer
arts.sum: Spanish football’s two leading clubs are amongst a select group of clubs who boast an option to sign Borussia Dortmund star Serhou Guirassy this summer. That’s according to German football…

arts.ttl: Barcelona boss Flick fresh Robert Lewandowski fitness update
arts.sum: Barcelona head coach Hansi Flick has provided a fresh insight into the situation of star striker Robert Lewandowski. Veteran frontman Lewandowski of course set alarm bells sounding across Catalunya’s capital…

arts.ttl: Laureus Awards: Yamal wins breakthrough award
arts.sum: Lamine Yamal won the world breakthrough of the year award at the 2025 Laureus World Sports Awards ceremony in Madrid on Monday.
